xsl:for-each.select: /offer/products/product[ price/@gross > 0 and description/name/. != '' and ( producer/@id != '1594118308' or producer/@id != '1603014478' )]

xsl:when.test: @textid != '' and contains(@textid, 'Drony') and not(contains(../../../../@id, '28134')) and not(contains(@textid, 'Drony PowerVisiontowary')) and not(contains(translate(@textid, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw')) and not(contains(@textid, 'Akcesoria Chasing')) and not(contains(@textid, 'Sieci RTK i RTN')) and not(contains(@textid, 'Drony\Drony FPV\iFlight\Akcesoria')) and not(contains(@textid, 'Drony\Zastosowanie\Roboty edukacyjne')) and not(contains(@textid, 'Drony\Marki\Drony BetaFPV\Akcesoria')) and not(contains(translate(../../../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'ubezpieczenie'))

contains($id_dron, $id_typ_wer) or not(contains($id_pozostałe, $id_typ_wer)) and contains($typeOption, 'dron') and (contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'dron ') or not(contains($typeOption, 'zestaw dronów')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szkolenie')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'śmigła')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'agregat')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'aio')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'akumulator')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'aparatura')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'camera')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'literadio')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'baza')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'opaska')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'etui')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'dji')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'flaga')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'gogle')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'kamera')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'kontroler')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'ładowarka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'makerzoid robomaster')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'mapowania')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'opryskiwacza')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'rozsiewacza')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'naklejki fluorescencyjne')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'obudowa wodoodporna')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'opryskiwacz do sadów')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'pigtail')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'pilot zdalnego sterowania')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'podręcznik dla nauczyciela Krypton')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'programowalne przyciski dźwiękowe')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'rama do drona')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'robot do nauki kodowania')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'silniki bezszczotkowe')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'silniki szczotkowe')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'smycz do aparatury')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'statyw stacji')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'taśma LED')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'uchwyt na panel')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'wielozadaniowa mata edukacyjna')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zapasowa rama')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zasilacz AC')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zbiornik')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw filtrów')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw akcesoriów')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw do nauki kodowania')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw Ecoflow')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw kabli')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw Klimatyzator')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw Lodówka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw pasków')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw robot do nauki kodowania')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'złącza')))
contains($id_zestaw, $id_typ_wer) or not(contains($id_pozostałe, $id_typ_wer)) and contains($typeOption, 'zestaw dronów')

(../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN10' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN8' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN14' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN12' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'UPCE') and @code_producer!='' and not(starts-with(@code_producer, '2') or starts-with(@code_producer, '02') or starts-with(@code_producer, '04'))

translate($cleanedToken,$lowerLetters,'') != '' and string-length(translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and (translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='ml' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='l' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='g' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='kg' )
